title: The Chase Begins
description: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro, Luffy. The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Don't you get it, nice Nico Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The Blueprint you guys were after...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: was a fake.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: On the other hand...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The ancient weapon!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I just want to know the history.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no use in saying that!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: A thing that can hurt people

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Might not have evil intern- Tions!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What do you know about Ohara!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because of the world govern-ment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then why are you helping them...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The CPP gave me two conditions...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SHFF...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then you might as well be dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: BASTER CALL?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's an emergency order that summons

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's nothing more you can do.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And the top admirable could use it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Through general Aokiji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But right now...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I can't do that....!!!

summary: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
